form.topic: Why sleep consistency matters more than total hours

generatedScript.title: Sleep consistency beats chasing hours
generatedScript.description: A calm, advertiser-friendly explainer on sleep regularity for busy adults.
generatedScript.primarySetting: a calm bedroom with soft morning light
generatedScript.hook: If your sleep schedule swings wildly, your body may struggle more than you think.
mainPoints: Consistent wake times help anchor your circadian rhythm.
Stable routines improve mood and focus more than occasional long sleeps.
Small nightly adjustments beat extreme weekend catch-ups.
generatedScript.ending: Pick one wake time for the next week and protect it like a meeting.
generatedScript.ctaLine: Subscribe for more practical health basics in under a minute.
